section_name: Failure to return license, registration or license plate.
text: Any person willfully failing to return a license, certificate of registration or license plate as required in NRS 485.320 is guilty of a misdemeanor.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.340 — Failure to return license, registration or license plate.

Any person willfully failing to return a license, certificate of registration or license plate as required in NRS 485.320 is guilty of a misdemeanor.

subsections.text: Any person willfully failing to return a license, certificate of registration or license plate as required in NRS 485.320 is guilty of a misdemeanor.
